name: @br3nt/jst
description: JavaScript Templates: no-build reactive web components in plain HTML.

scripts.test: node --test runtime_tests.mjs regression_tests.mjs && node run_browser_tests.mjs && node run_example_smoke.mjs && npm run test:parity && npm run test:agentic && npm --prefix tooling/vscode-jst test
scripts.test:parity: node framework_parity/verify.mjs framework_parity/htmx/*.html framework_parity/alpine/*.html framework_parity/vue/*.html framework_parity/react/*.html
